queue.task: Fix tpch-compiled.test.js: set _compileThreshold=50 to test compilation at small scale
queue.summary: Fixed 6 tpch-compiled failures. Root cause: compile threshold 5000 > test data size. Set _compileThreshold=50 in tests. 7/7 pass.
